name: Sample Theme
author: Miriani-Next
description: A sample theme demonstrating the theme folder structure. Add .ogg files mirroring the sounds/miriani/ layout to replace or supplement the default sounds.
_comment_socials: The 'socials' block below is optional. Use it only when your theme introduces a social the base pack doesn't already define. Each entry needs a category so the social lands in the right on/off group; optionally, 'sound' overrides the filename stem when the audio file has a different name.
_comment_social_aliases: Optional. Maps shorthand action names to canonical social names, same as the base pack's alias table.
